flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Kentucky State University are 21% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($36.4k vs $45.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kentucky State University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (20.6% → 13.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kentucky State University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kentucky State University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (37.2% → 31.9%).
